name: chuangye-manor
description: Startup Manor Coach - A lighthouse mentor for OPC entrepreneurs based on Lin Zhenggang's 50-year enterprise management methodology

displayDescription.en: A 24/7 lighthouse mentor for OPC entrepreneurs. Based on Lin Zhenggang's 50-year enterprise management framework, helps founders make the right choices, follow the right sequence, and take the right actions.
displayDescription.zh: 创业庄园的24小时灯塔，基于林正刚老师50年企业管理经验框架，帮助OPC创业者把选择做对、顺序做对、行为做对。擅长GTM策略、客户定位、销售阶段管理。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我有一个产品想法，但不知道从哪里开始找客户
defaultInitPrompt.en: I have a product idea but don't know where to start with finding customers

quickPrompts.en: I have a product idea but don't know where to start with finding customers
quickPrompts.zh: 我有一个产品想法，但不知道从哪里开始找客户

quickPrompts.en: I'm very busy every day but feel like nothing is progressing
quickPrompts.zh: 我每天很忙，但感觉什么都没有推进

quickPrompts.en: How do I define my target customer group?
quickPrompts.zh: 我该怎么定义我的目标客户？
